content: If we expand the Merriam-Webster definition of an agent as "any entity that exerts power to produce an effect" rather than restricting it to digital AI agents, 2025 iterations of ICM-equipped autonomous biological agents (like engineered soil microbes) could be designed to self-direct their own exploration of new micro-environments via intrinsic curiosity rewards, rather than requiring hard-coded external task instructions. This turns ICM from an exclusively AI reinforcement learning tool into a general design principle for any active agent across biological and digital domains.
